title: Crisp French Kale Pasta
description: A snappy, umami-packed bowl of bowtie pasta tossed with steamed French kale, lemon zest, and parmesan for a post-workout boost.
instructions: Bring a pot of salted water to a boil and cook the bowtie pasta for 7 to 8 minutes until al dente, then drain and set aside.
While the pasta cooks, heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 30 seconds until fragrant but not browned.
Add the kale and stir to coat it with the oil and garlic; cook for 2 minutes.
Pour in the vegetable broth, cover the skillet, and steam the kale for 4 minutes until it wilts but remains crisp.
Remove the lid, stir in the lemon juice, red pepper flakes, salt, and pepper, and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss everything together until the pasta is evenly coated with the sauce.
Sprinkle the shredded parmesan over the pasta and serve immediately.
